version_description: Includes both tab and chords. Link to this song: https://youtu.be/DLS8W9s-6Co?si=kigvA6svwuG4li0J.

versions.version_description: From 2024. Link to the song: https://youtu.be/_vWA5S1xDYI.
I like my outro better cuz it's easier. Your strum should be down then silence it then down again then silence again.

tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
WIND UP MISSIN' YOU (2024) by Tucker Wetmore


Tuning: Half-Step Down. All chords are relative.


[tab]Tabbed picking pattern. Play each time G or Cadd9 chord comes up
  [ch]Gsus2[/ch]
eb|--------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
Bb|-3------3-----3-----------------------|-3------3-----3-----------------------|
Gb|-2h4----4-----2-------------------0---|-2h4----4-----2-------------------0---|
Db|---------------------2h4-----4--------|---------------------2h4-----4--------|
Ab|--------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
Eb|-3----3----3----3----3----3----3----3-|-3----3----3----3----3----3----3----3-|[/tab]

[tab]  Cadd9/Csus2
eb|--------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
Bb|-3------3-----3-----------------------|-3------3-----3-----------------------|
Gb|-2h4----4-----2-------------------0---|-2h4----4-----2-------------------0---|
Db|---------------------2h4-----4--------|---------------------2h4-----4--------|
Ab|-3----3----3----3----3----3----3----3-|-3----3----3----3----3----3----3----3-|
Eb|--------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|[/tab]

Chords for strumming:
[ch]G[/ch]      3X0033
[ch]Cadd9[/ch]  X32033
[ch]Em7[/ch]    022033
[ch]D[/ch]      XX0232
[ch]Am7[/ch]    X02010

[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I know I might look like[/tab]

Another ball cap on a barstool
[tab]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Underneath a PBR light[/tab]

Saying everything under the moon
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
To get you into my arms tonight[/tab]

You probably heard it all a thousand times
[tab]                     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
But it ain't what it looks like[/tab]

Girl, let me tell you what it looks like

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You look like waves on a sunset[/tab]

And you can crash on me all night
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
You look like wine in a truck bed[/tab]

A little what I'm doing for the rest of my life 'cause
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You look like I'm done looking[/tab]

But, girl, the hard truth is
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
If this night don't turn into two[/tab]
[tab]                                             [ch]G[/ch]
You look like I'm gonna wind up missin' you[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I've gotta tell you, baby, I've been[/tab]

The kind of boy your daddy never wanted you
[tab]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
To go and fall in love with[/tab]

The kind of boys you're probably
                N.C.
Done with their dumb shit, yeah
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I bet you've heard the stories and[/tab]

Can't I say I'm proud of that but
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I've turned the page on the old me[/tab]

And now I ain't lookin' back 'cause

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You look like waves on a sunset[/tab]

And you can crash on me all night
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
You look like wine in a truck bed[/tab]

A little what I'm doing for the rest of my life 'cause
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You look like I'm done looking[/tab]

But, girl, the hard truth is
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
If this night don't turn into two[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]Em7[/ch]
You look like I'm gonna wind up missin'[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Missin' you in the mornin'[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Probably for the next few years[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Am7[/ch]
And when I look back on it[/tab]

I still see you right here

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You look like waves on a sunset[/tab]

And you can crash on me all night
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
You look like wine in a truck bed[/tab]

A little what I'm doing for the rest of my life 'cause
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You look like I'm done looking[/tab]

But, girl, the hard truth is
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
If this night don't turn into two[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]G[/ch]
You look like I'm gonna wind up missin' you[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Wind up missin' you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
Wind up missin' you[/tab]

| h  Hammer-on
